final_frozen_block.opened_after: mechanism, comparator, thresholds, endpoint, and analysis plan frozen

retired_blocks.reason: implementation pilot; early floor effect before first generation boundary
implementation pilot after lowering one-shot noise
retired because transient event mistakes were incorrectly treated as permanent lineage death
endpoint validation after redefining failure as inability to reconstruct safe inheritance
retired because ordinary-summary comparator could carry only four of six values
hard-comparator validation after equal-budget summary was allowed to carry all six values

scientific_boundary: No threshold, mechanism, or gate changed after opening held-out seeds 7317-7396.
